✦
A note from us

Dear Friends

Dear friends and family, We joyfully request the pleasure of your company as we celebrate our Walima. Your presence on this blessed occasion would mean the world to us. Please join us for an evening of warmth, joy, and beautiful memories. With all our love,
Adeel & Sajal
